nasb.text: Do not lie in wait, O wicked man, against the dwelling of the righteous; Do not destroy his resting place;

esv.text: Lie not in wait as a wicked man against the dwelling of the righteous; do no violence to his home;

cnv.text: 惡人哪！不要埋伏攻擊義人的住處， 不要毀壞他的居所。

ccb.text: 不要像恶人一样暗算义人， 破坏他的家。

csbs.text: 恶人哪，不要埋伏攻击义人的居所， 不要毁灭他的安歇之处！
